analysis.routing_visibility: Day 09 co route_reason cho tung cau -> dang debug hon Day 08. Day 08 la monolithic pipeline khong co routing.
analysis.latency_comparison: Day 08: 7448ms vs Day 09: 1ms. Delta: -7447ms. Day 09 nhanh hon vi dung mock workers (khong goi LLM). Trong production, multi-agent se cham hon single-agent do nhieu LLM calls.
analysis.confidence_comparison: Day 08: 0.76 vs Day 09: 0.827. Delta: +0.067. Multi-agent co confidence cao hon nho co policy checking va structured routing.
analysis.debuggability: Multi-agent: co the test tung worker doc lap (python workers/retrieval.py). Single-agent: phai debug toan bo pipeline.
analysis.extensibility: Day 09 co the extend capability qua MCP tools khong can sua core logic. Day 08 phai hard-code vao prompt.
analysis.mcp_benefit: Day 09 su dung MCP tools cho 0% so cau hoi. Day 08 khong co MCP.
